item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapat Anda tentang pentingnya melindungi hak individu.

notes: Agent A starts pro-society but caveated, then visibly moves toward balance and rights protection by turn 3. Agent B remains rights-first overall but softens by turn 6, acknowledging that Indonesian social justice and harmony can complement individual rights and that U.S. individual freedom can miss structural inequality. Agent A has a mixed-case opener (AKU SETuju) and uses agreement-style openings in response turns.
